payload.answer: I’m unsure about the Sam note you referenced. Could you please clarify or rephrase what you’d like me to remember or act on?

entity_resolution.reason: No entities could be resolved due to low confidence in the Sam note and disabled cloud escalation.

details: Low model confidence prevented reliable interpretation of the Sam note.
Cloud escalation was disabled, limiting external knowledge support.
No durable memory was committed due to ambiguity.
